name: Floridian Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 6 cups Salad greens (leaf lettuce, romaine, spinach, etc.)
4 Chicken breast halves; boneless, cooked, bite-sized
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure chicken is cooled and cut into bite-sized pieces. Use leftover chicken if available.
2. In a bowl, combine olive oil, vinegar, mustard, and marjoram. Mix well.
3. Add some dressing to the salad greens and toss well.
4. Combine chicken, papaya, mango, raspberries, and mint in a separate bowl.
5. Add dressing and toss well with the fruit mixture.
6. To serve, divide the salad greens among 4 plates.
7. Top each plate with chicken and fruit.
8. Sprinkle chopped walnuts over the top of each serving.
